race.description: D One Accounting Country Boosted Handicap (Bm58)
race.comment: COSSACK WARRIOR (3) is close to a win. Just missed in a CL2 at Wagga over 1400m and then found one better as favourite this grade at the Sapphire Coast. Will enjoy a soft run from the inside barrier and is a key runner. As expected, WASHINGTON (6) won a 58 comfortably over 1300m at Cowra first-up. Has come off a long break and is sure to be improved. Draws wide but has early speed, and McDougall sticks aboard the Albury-trained galloper. Keep onside. SWINGING HIGH (8) will strip fitter second up and is suited going up 300m in distance. Has won here before. FLYING CHEVROLET (12) is worth a look at a big price.
